name: Coconut Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the temperature reaches 237 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Allow to cool in the pan or on a marble slab until warm.
4. Beat with a spatula until the mixture becomes dull and creamy.
5. Spread in an 8-inch square pan.
6. Cut into squares.
7. Makes about 49 pieces.
